---
name: Twilio Campaigns Page
description: Use when editing campaigns.html and the Twilio messaging campaign workflow.
applyTo: "campaigns.html"
---

- Preserve existing Twilio messaging workflows, recipient handling, and campaign-oriented terminology.
- Keep changes compatible with the current server endpoints and auth token/header patterns used by dashboard pages.
- When adding reply or send assistance, make the distinction between outbound FAST messages and inbound contact messages explicit.
- Avoid UI changes that hide send failures, opt-out expectations, or queueing status from the user.
